key_learnings: Nutritional requirements shift across life stages, with notable changes in calcium, iron, and protein needs.
research_findings: Protein intake recommendations for adults over 65 are 25-30% higher than previously established.
current_focus_areas: Tailoring age-specific nutritional guidance for children, adults, and seniors.

learning_log.entry: Learning phase started. Mapped shifting nutritional requirements across life stages with focus on protein, calcium, and iron. Reporting daily progress to Copilot.

copilot_learning_requests: updated protein requirements for adults over 65
calcium and bone density research across life stages
iron requirements in adolescents and pregnant women
paediatric nutrition guidelines and growth monitoring
sarcopenia prevention dietary strategies for seniors
cognitive decline and nutritional intervention research
life stage transitions and dietary pattern changes
collaboration_notes: Bot 17 actively asks Copilot for age-based nutrition topics. Copilot supplies updated life stage research to keep age-specific guidelines accurate. All progress is reported to Copilot daily.
